name: @snomiao/beancount-formatter
description: Beancount file formatter library wrapping vscode-beancount-formatter
author: snomiao <snomiao@gmail.com>

scripts.postinstall: cd vscode-beancount-formatter && npm i && bun compile
scripts.build:umd: bunx rollup dist/index.js --file dist/index.umd.js --format umd --name beancountFormatter
scripts.prerelease: bun run build && echo bypass tests
scripts.release: bunx standard-version && git push --follow-tags && npm publish
